scenes.educational_goal_ko: 대형차량 진입·하역 작업의 충돌 위험을 인지한다.

source_citations.claim: 레미콘 사업장 충돌·접촉 안전작업 가이드는 대형차량 진입 및 하역 작업 시 필수 안전 수칙을 다룬다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 레미콘 사업장 입구에서 BCT와 덤프트럭 동선이 분리되어 표시된다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: separated traffic lanes for a BCT bulk cement trailer and a dump truck at a ready-mix concrete plant entrance, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: separated traffic lanes for a BCT bulk cement trailer and a dump truck at a ready-mix concrete plant entrance, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.

source_citations.claim: 사각지대 내 보행자 미인지 상태에서 대형차량 후진 및 회전 시 보행자 충돌 위험이 크다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 덤프트럭 후진 경로 옆 사각지대에 보행자 접근 금지 표시가 보인다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: a marked blind spot beside a reversing dump truck route with pedestrians kept outside the hazard zone, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: a marked blind spot beside a reversing dump truck route with pedestrians kept outside the hazard zone, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.

scenes.educational_goal_ko: 신호수 배치와 운전원 소통의 필요성을 이해한다.

source_citations.claim: 감시인 또는 신호수는 차량 유도 시 보행자 접근을 상시 감시하고 무전기와 신호봉으로 운전원과 소통해야 한다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 신호수가 신호봉과 무전기로 BCT 운전원에게 정지 신호를 보낸다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: a signal person using a baton and radio to communicate a stop signal to the BCT driver, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: a signal person using a baton and radio to communicate a stop signal to the BCT driver, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.

source_citations.claim: 사각지대 내 보행자 미인지 상태에서 대형차량 후진 및 회전 시 보행자 충돌 위험이 크다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 운전원이 후방카메라와 거울을 확인한 뒤 천천히 후진을 준비한다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: a driver checking the rear camera and mirrors before slowly reversing the heavy vehicle, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: a driver checking the rear camera and mirrors before slowly reversing the heavy vehicle, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.

scenes.educational_goal_ko: 지정 구역 외 임의 작업과 통로 침범을 금지한다.

source_citations.claim: 지정 구역 외 임의 작업과 통로 침범은 차량 밀림 및 끼임 위험을 높인다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 작업자가 지정 구역 밖 차량 통로로 들어가려다 관리감독자의 안내로 멈춘다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: a worker stopping before entering a vehicle passage outside the designated work zone while a supervisor redirects them, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: a worker stopping before entering a vehicle passage outside the designated work zone while a supervisor redirects them, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.

scenes.educational_goal_ko: 속도 제한과 보행 중 스마트폰 금지를 준수한다.

source_citations.claim: 근로자는 사업장 내 제한속도 10~20km 이하를 준수하고 보행 중 스마트폰 사용을 금지해야 한다.

scenes.visual_action_ko: 현장 표지판에 제한속도 10~20km와 스마트폰 사용 금지가 표시된다.
scenes.image_prompt_en: Korean industrial safety training animation style, ready-mix concrete plant, BCT bulk cement trailer and dump truck, signal person with orange vest, hard hat, scene action: site safety signs showing a 10 to 20 km speed limit and no smartphone use while walking, clear blind spot zone, safe pedestrian route, no text, no injury, no impact frame.
scenes.motion_prompt_en: Use start and end keyframes as a continuous safety training shot, slow camera movement, show this action: site safety signs showing a 10 to 20 km speed limit and no smartphone use while walking, keep BCT, dump truck, PPE, signal person, and plant layout consistent, avoid collision or injury depiction.
